title: The Annotated Turing
summary:
The Annotated Turing: A Guided Tour Through Alan Turing's Historic Paper on Computability and the Turing Machine is a book by Charles Petzold, published in 2008 by John Wiley & Sons, Inc.
Petzold annotates Alan Turing's paper "On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem". The book takes readers sentence by sentence through Turing's paper, providing explanations, further examples, corrections, and biographical information.
summary_sentences: The Annotated Turing: A Guided Tour Through Alan Turing's Historic Paper on Computability and the Turing Machine is a book by Charles Petzold, published in 2008 by John Wiley & Sons, Inc.
Petzold annotates Alan Turing's paper "On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem".
The book takes readers sentence by sentence through Turing's paper, providing explanations, further examples, corrections, and biographical information.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text:
The Annotated Turing: A Guided Tour Through Alan Turing's Historic Paper on Computability and the Turing Machine is a book by Charles Petzold , published in 2008 by John Wiley & Sons, Inc.
Petzold annotates Alan Turing 's paper "On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem ". The book takes readers sentence by sentence through Turing's paper, providing explanations, further examples, corrections, and biographical information. [ citation needed ]
